scope: Runtime truth presentation, interaction, accessibility, responsive layout, rendering paths, and denied release boundary only.
data_lineage_boundary: Displayed source pins and factual-use labels were checked for presence and consistency; upstream data lineage was not independently re-reviewed by CT-42.

gates.evidence: 249 registry entities render as 206 reviewed factual series plus 43 explicit source gaps; candidate review_status remains not_reviewed and production_runtime_release remains false.
No target, commitment, delivery, performance, impact-band, or climate-score conclusion is implied; cards state not reviewed/not assessed.
China remains rank 1 at 15,000 MtCO2e/yr; competition ties are preserved; source gaps are neutral, unnumbered, visible, and excluded from ranking.
Card exposes ten labelled 2014-2023 points, a ten-row Year/Value/Unit table, PRIMAP-hist v2.6.1 source link, unit, accounting-frame label, and limitations.
Accessible tree exposes labelled ranking controls, a wrapper-owned modal dialog, named chart image and points, table caption/headers, source, limitations, and assessment boundary.

No default dialog; user opener focuses heading; desktop and 320px Tab loops remain inside; ArrowRight retains focus on the replacement heading; Escape closes, hides tooltip from the accessibility tree, and restores the original rank control.
Visible rank rows, close, chart disclosure, source link, and desktop previous/next controls are at least 44px in the tested dimension.
Real 320x640 browser viewport has document scrollWidth=clientWidth=320 in foundation and globe modes; card is 248px wide and vertically scrollable; mobile rail title is 2023.

Real browser rendered CSS zoom=2 without horizontal overflow; independent 655x334 CSS-pixel viewport (1310x667 baseline at 200% reflow equivalent) had document widths 655/655 and an on-screen scrollable card.
Browser CSSOM found three reduced-motion media rules disabling animation and transition; emulated prefers-reduced-motion suppressed the mobile swipe cue.
Formal contrast checks: repaired light banner 7.514:1, light text minimum tested 6.287:1, dark text minimum tested 6.648:1; focus indicators remain explicit.
With candidate swatches forced to grayscale, rank/value/unit labels, explicit source-gap/not-ranked label, three legend texts, and assessment-boundary copy remain available.
Pinned globe.gl rendered one WebGL canvas and 204 country polygon features; SmokeTest reported polygon presence.
Forced no-polygon facade rendered 204 hex features; China retained orange magnitude color and altitude 0.026 while a source gap retained neutral color and altitude 0.004.
SmokeTest 18/18 passed with zero critical failures; StackLint returned zero issues.

publication_boundary.required_next_gate: CT-40 independent allow decision plus reviewed runtime manifest and release diff
